name: Jimeng AI Reference
description: A cinematic Chinese AI imaging system inspired by Jimeng public pages, with dark immersive hero media, dreamlike gradients, prompt-to-video sections, smart canvas controls, and inspiration-community cards.

en.name: Jimeng AI Reference
en.description: A cinematic Chinese AI imaging system inspired by Jimeng public pages, with dark immersive hero media, dreamlike gradients, prompt-to-video sections, smart canvas controls, and inspiration-community cards.

zh-CN.name: 即梦 AI 参考
zh-CN.description: 受即梦公开页面启发的电影感中文 AI 影像系统，包含深色沉浸式首屏媒体、梦幻渐变、提示词生成视频区块、智能画布控件和灵感社区卡片。
